---
name: Feature request / improvement
about: Suggest a new domain, better search patterns, or missing resources
labels: enhancement
---

**What's the gap?**
<!-- Describe what the skill currently misses or does poorly -->

**Domain or workflow affected**
<!-- e.g. dev, writing, data, ops, research — or a new domain not yet covered -->

**Proposed change**
<!-- What would you add or change in SKILL.md? Concrete suggestions are easier to act on than general ideas -->

**Why it matters**
<!-- What task would this improve? What wheel was reinvented because this was missing? -->
